zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Loveday於1352年出生在英國波克夏史利文哈姆時，她的父親Henry Loveday26歲，母親Margaret May Bunn22歲。她於1378年與John Fowler IV在英國英格蘭波克夏結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1385年在英國波克夏享年33歲，埋葬在英國波克夏布雷。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Loveday于1352年出生在英国波克夏史利文哈姆时，她的父亲Henry Loveday26岁，母亲Margaret May Bunn22岁。她于1378年与John Fowler IV在英国英格兰波克夏结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1385年在英国波克夏享年33岁，埋葬在英国波克夏布雷。

nameMeanings.name: Loveday
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: from the Middle English female personal nameLoveday, Old English Lēofdæg, composed of theelements lēof ‘dear, beloved’ + dæg‘day’.
nickname for someone who had some particular associationwith a ‘loveday’. According to medieval custom this was a day setaside for the reconciliation of enemies and amicable settlement ofdisputes.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Loveday was born in 1352, in Shrivenham, Berkshire, England, her father, Henry Loveday, was 26 and her mother, Margaret May Bunn, was 22. She married John Fowler IV in 1378, in Berkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1385, in Berkshire, England, at the age of 33, and was buried in Bray, Berkshire, England.

fr.Vale of White Horse District, Shrivenham: Vale of White Horse, Oxfordshire, Angleterre
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Loveday est née en 1352, à Shrivenham, Berkshire, Angleterre, son père, Henry Loveday, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Margaret May Bunn, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé John Fowler IV en 1378, à Berkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1385, à Berkshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 33 ans, et a été enterrée à Bray, Berkshire, Angleterre.

de.Vale of White Horse District, Shrivenham: Vale of White Horse, Oxfordshire, England
de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Loveday 1352 in Shrivenham, Berkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Henry Loveday 26 und ihre Mutter Margaret May Bunn 22. Sie hat 1378 in Berkshire, England, United Kingdom John Fowler IV geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1385 im Alter von 33 Jahren in Berkshire, England und wurde in Bray, Berkshire, England begraben.

Lei sposato John Fowler IV nel 1378, nel Berkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1385, nel Berkshire, England, all'età di 33 anni, e fu sepolta a Bray, Berkshire, England.

ko.Vale of White Horse District, Shrivenham: 영국 스퍼드실르 발 프 휘트 호르스
ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Loveday(이)가 1352년 영국 버크실르 슈라이븐함에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Henry Loveday(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret May Bunn(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1378년 영국 잉글랜드 버크실르에서 John Fowler IV(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1385년 영국 버크실르에서 33세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 버크실르 브라이에 묻혔다.

ru.Vale of White Horse District, Shrivenham: веил оф уит хаурс, оксфордшир, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Loveday родилась в 1352 г. в местности шривенам, биркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Henry Loveday было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret May Bunn, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Fowler IV в 1378 г. в местности биркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1385 г. в местности биркшир, Англия в возрасте 33 лет и была похоронена в местности брэи, биркшир, Англия.
